# stalwart_domain (Data Source)

Reads a Stalwart domain by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stalwart_domain" "example" {
  name = "example.com"
}

output "domain_id" {
  value = data.stalwart_domain.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Fully-qualified domain name to look up, e.g. `example.com`.

### Read-Only

- `aliases` (List of String) Alias domain names.
- `catchall` (String) Catch-all email address for the domain.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp of the domain.
- `description` (String) Description of the domain.
- `directory_id` (String) Opaque id of the authentication directory used for this domain (if any).
- `dkim_management` (String) DKIM management mode (`Automatic` or `Manual`).
- `dns_management` (String) DNS management mode (`Automatic` or `Manual`).
- `dns_zone_file` (String) Current DNS zone data the server expects to be published for the domain.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the domain is enabled.
- `id` (String) Opaque server-assigned identifier of the domain.
